name: Ispire The Wand
summary: A torchless induction heater for concentrate bangers and DynaVap caps, for patients who prefer flame-free dabbing.
description: The Ispire Wand is a battery-powered induction heater that brings a borosilicate glass banger up to your chosen temperature without a butane torch. It runs across a wide manual temperature range on two replaceable 18650 batteries, and also heats DynaVap caps if you use one. For patients prescribed concentrates who want consistent, flame-free dabs, it removes the main hazard and guesswork of torch dabbing. The body is plastic and it pairs with a separate rig or DynaVap rather than working alone, so think of it as the heat source in a wider setup.
